data.title: Bitcoin's Market Value Falls Below Saudi Aramco
data.description: According to BlockBeats, data from 8 Market indicates that Bitcoin's value recently dropped below $82,000, causing its market capitalization to decrease to $1.631 trillion. This decline allowed Saudi Aramco, with a market value of $1.696 trillion, to surpass Bitcoin, pushing it to the tenth position among major global assets.

data.title: Nouns DAO invested $150,000 in a baked bean project that never started, and the whereabouts of the funds are unknown
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The Nouns community approved a proposal three years ago to invest 135 ETH (about $150,000 at the time) in a project called MOOØNBEANS, which plans to produce and sell high-end baked beans with recipes provided by Sublime Butter (a UK-based handmade butter company). However, three years later, the project has not produced any canned baked beans, and it is unknown where Noun DAO's $150,000 investment ultimately went. Tony Ho, a director of Sublime Butter, said the funds were never used in the company, and that the company had removed founder Chris Mair as a director in July 2023 and accused him of fraudulently using the brand for investment fundraising. (The Block)

data.title: Cango sells its auto finance business to Ursalpha for $352 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Cango announced that it sold its domestic auto finance business to Ursalpha Digital Limited, which is associated with Bitmain's subsidiary Antalpha, for $352 million. The transaction is part of Cango's comprehensive transformation of its Bitcoin mining business. 
It is reported that the transaction includes an advance payment of $210.6 million paid by Ursalpha, and additional installments depend on fulfilling tax obligations and reducing the credit risk exposure of the divested entity. In addition, Cango mined 530 BTC in March and held 2,475 coins. (Theminermag)

data.title: WisdomTree will support institutional users to access tokenized funds on Ethereum, Base, Arbitrum and other chains
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News WisdomTree announced that it will support institutional users to access Arbitrum, Base, Avalanche, Ethereum and Optimism on-chain tokenized funds through its WisdomTree Connect. WisdomTree revealed that its institutional clients have a strong interest in tokenized funds, so it has specially created a suite that truly allows any investor to build a diversified portfolio on the chain. (Blockworks)

data.title: MARA Holdings Plans $2 Billion Share Offering to Create a Crypto Treasury With Post-Bitcoin Halving Strategy
data.description:
MARA Holdings, a Bitcoin mining company, plans to make a $2 billion stock offering to buy more Bitcoin holdings, combining market forces with cryptocurrencies. MARA wrote a prospectus that was filed with the Securities and Exchange Commission to create a stock offering on the market. A group of investment banks, such as Barclays, BMO Capital […]
source: https://zycrypto.com/mara-holdings-plans-2-billion-share-offering-to-create-a-crypto-treasury-with-post-bitcoin-halving-strategy/

data.title: TD Cowen says effort to tie stablecoin bill to Trump and Musk is ‘political roadblock’
data.description:
TD Cowen says hurdles "can still be overcome given how many Democrats are supportive of the need to enact a stablecoin bill. "
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/349449/td-cowen-stablecoin-bill-trump-musk-political-roadblock?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Fidelity Now Offers Crypto Exposure for Retirement Savings
data.description:
TL;DR Fidelity now offers U. S. investors crypto retirement accounts, allowing BTC, ETH, and LTC transactions within 401(k)s and IRAs. The initiative eliminates maintenance fees and provides diverse IRA options, bridging traditional finance with the crypto market
source: https://crypto-economy.com/fidelity-now-offers-crypto-exposure-for-retirement-savings/

data.title: Solana's Perena Protocol Surpasses $20 Million in TVL
data.description: According to BlockBeats, data from DeFiLlama indicates that the total value locked (TVL) in Solana's stablecoin infrastructure protocol, Perena, has exceeded $20 million. The current TVL stands at $24.72 million, marking a significant milestone for the protocol within the Solana ecosystem.

data.title: Ripple's RLUSD Stablecoin Sees Significant Issuance Amid Growing Demand
data.description:
According to CoinDesk, over $100 million in Ripple USD (RLUSD) has been issued since April 1, marking one of the highest levels in recent months as demand for this relatively new stablecoin intensifies. Earlier this week, a $50 million tranche of RLUSD was issued on Tuesday, followed by another $50 million on Wednesday. This issuance coincides with Ripple's integration of the stablecoin into its official payments product, with payment providers BKK Forex and iSend reportedly already utilizing the stablecoin. Industry experts anticipate that RLUSD could significantly alter the dynamics of the crypto market, potentially challenging established players like tether (USDT) and USD Coin (USDC) with Ripple's offering.

The RLUSD stablecoin, pegged 1:1 to the U.S. dollar, is available on both the XRP Ledger and Ethereum blockchain. It is fully backed by U.S. dollar deposits, short-term U.S. Treasuries, and cash equivalents, ensuring its stability. To maintain its peg, RLUSD employs a 1:1 reserve system, where each token corresponds to an equivalent fiat value. Users can mint RLUSD by depositing dollars with authorized partners who issue the tokens, or they can burn RLUSD to redeem cash. Market arbitrage plays a crucial role in stabilizing its price: if RLUSD trades below $1, traders purchase it to redeem at par, thereby increasing demand; conversely, if it trades above $1, more tokens are minted, boosting supply.

Security features enhance RLUSD's appeal to institutional users. An amendment to the XRP Ledger in January introduced a "clawback" feature, enabling the issuer to reclaim or "claw back" certain tokens, such as RLUSD, from users' wallets under specific conditions. This feature is generally implemented for regulatory compliance, allowing the recovery of assets in cases of fraud, illegal activities, or when tokens are sent to unintended addresses. As RLUSD gains traction on various platforms, it is expected to boost demand for the XRP token, particularly among decentralized financial (DeFi) applications based on the XRP Ledger.

data.title: Traders Anticipate Potential Fourth Fed Rate Cut in 2025
data.description: According to BlockBeats, traders have increased their bets on a potential interest rate cut by the Federal Reserve, with a 50% probability of a fourth rate reduction expected this year.
